scope: MapGen Studio recipe-DAG service import graph
forbids: Studio recipe-DAG service depending on runtime recipe modules, generated maps, dist/mod outputs, or authoring roots instead of contract-only surfaces
why: The Studio recipe-DAG service consumes contract metadata, not runtime MapGen recipe implementation.
remediate: Route Studio recipe-DAG metadata through contract-only recipe surfaces.
message: Studio recipe-DAG import graph crossed runtime recipe boundaries.
